title: Northwind products — read-only
description: A read-only mock of the Northwind product catalogue. Exposes a paginated list and a detail-by-id endpoint, served from samples.northwind.products without any dbo. Good as a starting point for a frontend that needs realistic product data.

calls.description: List products with optional pagination and category filter.
Get a single product by id (productID). Returns 404 if not found.
